tossups.question: While studying under Marià Fortuny, this artist painted a sitting African woman nicknamed "Ebony" by critics. This artist's young daughter sits on a branch with feet dangling in his portrait Dragonfly. A hunched over woman wearing black sees her gaunt son walk through the door in a painting by this artist. In 2018, a man with a metal pole vandalized a painting by this artist in which a cane lies on a blood red carpet below a ruler holding his bloodied son in his arms. This member of the Wanderers painted mustached men surrounding a large table where a letter to the Turkish Sultan is being written. For 10 points, name this artist of Barge Haulers on the Volga and Reply of the Zaporozhian Cossacks, who was a Russian painter.
tossups.answer: Ilya Repin (The third clue refers to They Did Not Expect Him)
tossups.answer_sanitized: Ilya Repin (The third clue refers to They Did Not Expect Him)
tossups.question_sanitized: While studying under Maria Fortuny, this artist painted a sitting African woman nicknamed "Ebony" by critics. This artist's young daughter sits on a branch with feet dangling in his portrait Dragonfly. A hunched over woman wearing black sees her gaunt son walk through the door in a painting by this artist. In 2018, a man with a metal pole vandalized a painting by this artist in which a cane lies on a blood red carpet below a ruler holding his bloodied son in his arms. This member of the Wanderers painted mustached men surrounding a large table where a letter to the Turkish Sultan is being written. For 10 points, name this artist of Barge Haulers on the Volga and Reply of the Zaporozhian Cossacks, who was a Russian painter.

bonuses.leadin: In one of this artist’s paintings shows a malnourished child in the background, while the central figure is looking on angrily in his Duchess Sophia in the Convent. For 10 points each:
parts: Identify this painter of such as The Raising of Jarius’s Daughter and his more famous Reply of the Zaphrozian Cossacks to Sultan Mehmet.
Ilya Repin was an artist from this country whose other famous artists painted such works as Compositions and I and the Village by Wasilly Kandinsky and Marc Chagall respectively.

This work by Ilya Repin depicts the astonishment of a group of teenage girls looking towards a man walking into the room from a hallway. The foreground of this painting shows the mother getting up out of her armchair.
answers_sanitized: Russia [I guess you can accept Soviet Union]
Unexpected Visitor [Accept They Did not Expect Him]
